posts.author: Warning Letter Wednesday
posts.text:
AI & Quality Related Warning Letter

Weekly teardown of a real FDA enforcement action against a supplement company, this one involving AI-generated claims and quality systems.
posts.why: NEW SOURCE. Settl compliance gold: how regulators are treating AI-written supplement claims, taught through a real enforcement letter.

posts.author: Nate's Newsletter
posts.text:
Claude vs. Codex isn't about code. It's about whether you steer or dispatch.

Implementation-level take on choosing and running AI agents: when you steer one agent closely vs dispatch many.
posts.why: NEW SOURCE. Directly about how you run Claude day-to-day and what you'll sell clients.

posts.author: One Useful Thing
posts.text:
What it feels like to work with Mythos

Mollick's hands-on read of the newest frontier model: what it changes about delegating real work to AI, with his usual evidence-over-hype approach.
posts.why: NEW SOURCE. The most trusted practical-AI voice on what the latest model actually does for work.

posts.author: Science Says
posts.text:
When AI-written messages backfire

Peer-reviewed research on when customers react badly to AI-written communication, and when they don't, distilled into a 3-minute tactic.
posts.why: NEW SOURCE. You send AI-written messages across four businesses; this is the evidence on where that costs you.

posts.author: Jackson Blackledge
posts.text:
google's making another big move on chat commerce

they launched 3 new ad formats in ai mode and search

1. conversational discovery ads: embedded inside ai mode's responses

2. highlighted answers: appear inside ai mode's recommendation lists.

3. ai-powered shopping ads
posts.why: Google's new AI-mode ad formats, concrete and fresh. Relevant to the stores' Google spend. His follow-up promo link got binned; this stands alone.

posts.author: Matt Wolfe
posts.why: Video companion to the Mollick essay above; same model, different lens.

posts.author: Corey Ganim
posts.text:
My friend @IMJustinBrooke made $260K off this workflow.

I'm giving you the full playbook for free.

Bookmark this.
posts.why: 13-persona AI focus group for ad copy. Still unvoted; the wording is baity, your vote calibrates that rule.

posts.author: Jon Loomer
posts.text:
Hands-On With Push Delivery to This Ad

Loomer tests Meta's new push-delivery option in his own account: what it does, where it shows up, and what to watch before using it.
posts.why: NEW SOURCE. The fastest independent read on Ads Manager changes before they hit your four accounts.

posts.author: Foxwell Digital
posts.text:
Cracking the Code: Understanding Attribution Windows in Digital Marketing

What 1-day vs 7-day click attribution actually tells you, and how senior buyers set windows by objective.
posts.why: NEW SOURCE. Attribution windows trip up every multi-account advertiser; this is the grounded version.

Where advertisers get audience segments wrong in the Advantage+ era, and what to do instead.
